summary: Iteration 31: Brand Activation Questions Feature - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) Brand Portal Story Integrations tab shows summary stats row with Stories Featuring Brand (5), Brand Mentions (5), Activation Questions (5), Question Attempts (10), Pass Rate (0%), (2) Backend API /api/brand-portal/story-integrations returns activation_questions array with total_attempts, passed_count, failed_count fields, (3) Brand In Stories section shows real story excerpts mentioning LearnTech Pro, Smart Learning Tablet, Study Buddy App, (4) Brand Activation Questions section shows real questions like 'What tool did SJ use to research how to make her car faster?' with 0 passed, 6 failed counts, (5) Login page has 'Access Your Portal' grid with Parents/Brands/Students buttons with icons, (6) Register page has same 'Access Your Portal' grid, (7) Admin can access /brand-portal and see brand data, (8) SJ student progress shows non-zero values (Vocabulary: 9, Agentic Reach: 93, Reading Time: 23m)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brand Portal Story Integrations tab now shows: (1) Summary stats row with Stories Featuring Brand, Brand Mentions, Activation Questions, Question Attempts, Pass Rate, (2) Brand In Stories section with real story excerpts from narratives mentioning LearnTech Pro brand and products, (3) Brand Activation Questions section showing vision_check questions from chapters with pass/fail counts from read_logs, (4) Student Activation Responses section shows empty state when no written_answers exist. The API /api/brand-portal/story-integrations returns activation_questions array with fields: narrative_id, narrative_title, chapter_number, student_name, question, total_attempts, passed_count, failed_count. Login and Register pages have 'Access Your Portal' section with Parents (heart icon), Brands (megaphone icon), Students (graduation cap icon) buttons. SJ student has multiple stories with non-zero progress values.
